title: EXOTIC-CCR A001: Poisson/Weyl lifts of the Alpöge–Fable Keller map with dual-transport deficiency (∞,∞)
description:
EXOTIC-CCR v0.3.0 — Author: Daniel Eric Fredriksen (Quantyra Inc).

Erratum: v0.2.2 claimed deficiency indices (0,∞). Corrected to (∞,∞) after identifying an open backward-incomplete orbit family. See docs/notes/A001-ERRATUM-v0.2.2.md.

Results: Alpöge–Fable seed restated (det DF=−2, 3-collision); Poisson/Weyl lifts; X_1 incomplete; H=−iX_1 not ESS; (n_+,n_−)=(∞,∞); infinitely many self-adjoint extensions, none preferred by algebraic CCR data.

Non-claims: No gate/channel/advantage; seed discovery not claimed.

https://github.com/Quantyra/jacobian-weyl-quantum-phase-space
